testcase.name: test_11_get_admin_habits

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should be a list assert False + where False = isinstance({'habits': [{'action_data': '', 'action_type': 'generic', 'active': True, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T21:38:22.863241+00:00', ...}, {'action_data': '', 'action_type': 'generic', 'active': True, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T21:38:22.674349+00:00', ...}, {'action_data': '', 'action_type': 'generic', 'active': False, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T21:09:21.376919+00:00', ...}, {'action_data': '', 'action_type': 'generic', 'active': False, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T21:09:13.854278+00:00', ...}, {'action_data': '', 'action_type': 'generic', 'active': False, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T21:05:37.594595+00:00', ...}, {'action_data': '', 'action_type': 'generic', 'active': False, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T06:51:34.494589+00:00', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_113_admin_reset.py:315: in test_11_get_admin_habits assert isinstance(data, list), "Response should be a list" E AssertionError: Response should be a list E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'habits': [{'action_data': '', 'action_type': 'generic', 'active': True, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T21:38:22.863241+00:00', ...}, {'action_data': '', 'action_type': 'generic', 'active': True, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T21:38:22.674349+00:00', ...}, {'action_data': '', 'action_type': 'generic', 'active': False, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T21:09:21.376919+00:00', ...}, {'action_data': '', 'action_type': 'generic', 'active': False, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T21:09:13.854278+00:00', ...}, {'action_data': '', 'action_type': 'generic', 'active': False, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T21:05:37.594595+00:00', ...}, {'action_data': '', 'action_type': 'generic', 'active': False, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T06:51:34.494589+00:00', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.name: test_12_post_admin_habit
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_113_admin_reset.py:336: in test_12_post_admin_habit assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create habit: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create habit: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","title"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_Iteration113_Habit","description":"Test habit for iteration 113","category":"health","frequency":"daily","icon":"#x1F9EA"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
